meta.launchNote: Payment and delivery links are being finalized. Paid products currently use request-access CTAs so the shop can launch cleanly without fake checkout links.

products.title: Money OS Lite
products.description: A clean personal finance dashboard for monthly budgeting, sinking funds, and simple net-worth tracking.
products.bestFor: Freshers and early earners who want one calm home for money decisions.

products.title: Book Notes Vault
products.description: A reading system for quotes, takeaways, action points, and books-to-revisit without turning note-taking into homework.
products.bestFor: Readers who want better memory and retrieval from what they already finish.

products.title: Workout + Macro Tracker
products.description: A lightweight dashboard for workouts, body metrics, weekly wins, and the handful of habits that actually move physique progress.
products.bestFor: Anyone who wants a consistent gym system without turning life into a spreadsheet.

products.title: Finance Basics Cheat Sheet
products.description: A one-page style starter cheat sheet covering emergency fund, 50/30/20, debt, compounding, and beginner investing rules.
products.bestFor: Anyone who wants the main money basics in one quick reference.

products.title: High Protein Grocery List
products.description: A practical Indian grocery starter list for protein, carbs, fats, and easy backup snacks that work for busy weeks.
products.bestFor: Gym-goers who want fewer excuses when planning food.

products.title: Reading Notes Framework
products.description: A small prompt pack for extracting ideas, quotes, actions, and objections from books you want to remember.
products.bestFor: Readers who underline a lot but want retention instead of just accumulation.
